---
name: Feature request
about: A capability glint doesn't have yet
labels: enhancement
---

> **Agents are welcome to file these too.** If your user describes a workflow
> glint can't yet drive (a missing gesture, a sensor we don't expose, a platform
> not supported), submit a draft and the maintainer will scope it.

## `glint` version
<!-- e.g. 0.0.1. -->

## What you want to do
<!-- One sentence. The user-facing task — not the implementation. -->

## Why the current toolset doesn't cover it
<!-- Which tool(s) you tried + what's missing. "scroll_to_find can't reach an
     element behind an animated overlay" is more useful than "needs better
     overlay support". -->

## Sketch of the API
<!-- Optional. If you have a feel for it, what would the call look like?
     `new_tool toolName  arg1:"…"  arg2:42` is plenty. -->

## Acceptable workarounds today
<!-- What you're doing now to ship around the gap, if anything. -->
